meaning: n.雷克斯猫(一种鬈毛家猫,产于英国康沃尔和德文)
examples: Rex Tillerson has maintained the company's stable development and made the company extremely profitable.
Fifty years ago, classical scholar William Russell and microbiologist Rex Burch developed abstracts on how to make animal experiments more humane.
Tadpole Rex, a book about a frog who finds his inner dinosaur, caught Bird's attention.
And, count coach Rex Ryan among those who wasn't particularly thrilled with what he saw.
No prizes for guessing who, in that scenario, Mr Davies had in a T-Rex costume.
